change_summary: Shadow-audited liquid post-2019 platform/new-listing source cohort with existing shared trend/breakout engine only; no production universe change.
hypothesis: one narrow shadow universe can produce non-overlapping high-quality candidates after liquidity/data checks
next_retry_requires: A true outside-production, point-in-time constituent source with OHLCV coverage.
Slot-aware replacement replay before any production promotion.
Do not repeat this cohort as a raw production universe addition; current sample has negative forward returns and zero external coverage.
notes: Artifact: data/experiments/exp-20260502-008/exp_20260502_008_liquid_recent_ipo_new_listing_momentum_shadow_universe.json. Source APP/COIN/CRDO/DDOG/PLTR/SNOW had full snapshot coverage and passed liquidity in all windows, but outside-production source count was 0. Candidate count 0/9/6; same-day A/B overlap 0/6/3, weighted 60%. Forward returns across 15 candidates were negative: 5d avg -2.31%, 10d avg -2.23%, 20d avg -4.12%; scarce-slot proxy found zero candidate days with 3+ baseline entries. Decision observed_only, not production-ready.

parameters.single_causal_variable: liquid post-2019 platform/new-listing cohort in fixed OHLCV snapshots: APP, COIN, CRDO, DDOG, PLTR, SNOW; excludes ETFs, AI infra names BE/INTC/LITE, gap-recovery/event-sensitive pools, and production universe changes
